creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Under DEVELOPER=yes regime, building p5-subversion fails:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: 'lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16/mach/auto/SVN/_Core/.packlist' is referring to /usr/ports/devel/p5-subversion/work/stage
Warning: 'lib/libsvn_swig_perl-1.so.0.0.0' is not stripped consider using ${STRIP_CMD}
...

I see that there is a USE_PERL5=[...]fixpacklist, but it does not appear to work on my 10.0-RELEASE amd64.

I see this in .packlist:

[beginning is OK]
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16/mach/auto/SVN/_Repos/_Repos.so
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16/mach/auto/SVN/_Wc/_Wc.bs
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16/mach/auto/SVN/_Wc/_Wc.so
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/p5-subversion/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.16/man/man3/SVN::Base.3
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/p5-subversion/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.16/man/man3/SVN::Client.3
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/p5-subversion/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.16/man/man3/SVN::Core.3
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/p5-subversion/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.16/man/man3/SVN::Delta.3
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/p5-subversion/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.16/man/man3/SVN::Fs.3
[remainder also refers to wrkdirs]
